Off Calendar Nov-06-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia J. Van Steenberge. Luis G. Molina, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff. There being no appearance by the defendant, the Court ordered the matter off settlement conference; the request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
